revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R with possibilities |name={{C|Redirects with possibilities|With possibilities}} |from=a title that {{#ifexist: {{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}|is in [[WP:DRAFTSPACE|draft namespace]] at [[{{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}]], so {{red|'''''please do not create an article from this redirect'''''}} (unless moving a ready draft here). You are welcome to improve the draft article while it is being considered for inclusion in [[WP:mainspace|article namespace]]. If the draft link is a redirect, then you may boldly turn that redirect into a draft article[[Category:Redirects with draftspace articles]]|potentially could be expanded into a new article or other type of associated page such as a new template}}. The topic described by this title may be more detailed than is currently provided on the target page or in a section of that page |info= ** When the target page becomes too large, or for any reason a new page would be an improvement, this redirect may be replaced with an article, template or other project page that is carved out of the target page. See also {{tl|R to section}} and use together with this rcat when appropriate. ** If the topic of the redirect is not susceptible to expansion, then use other rcats such as {{tl|R to section}} or {{tl|R to list entry}} ''when appropriate''. ** Since a new page may be created, links to this redirect ''should '''not''''' be replaced with a direct link to the target page. To make ''redirects'' to this page, use {{tl|R avoided double redirect}}. ** {{tl|R printworthy}} should be used together with this template when applied to a redirect in [[WP:mainspace|mainspace]]. ** When used on a template redirect, it will automatically populate {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|'''{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}'''|{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}}}. |printworthy=yes |all category=<!--for automatic namespace detection--> }}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|R with possibilities||{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|[[Category:Template redirects with possibilities]]|[[Category:Redirects with possibilities]]}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R with possibilities |name={{C|Redirects with possibilities|With possibilities}} |from=a title that {{#ifexist: {{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}|is in [[WP:DRAFTSPACE|draft namespace]] at [[{{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}]], so {{red|'''''please do not create an article from this redirect'''''}} (unless moving a ready draft here). You are welcome to improve the draft article while it is being considered for inclusion in [[WP:mainspace|article namespace]]. If the draft link is a redirect, then you may boldly turn that redirect into a draft article[[Category:Redirects with draftspace articles]]|potentially could be expanded into a new article or other type of associated page such as a new template}}. The topic described by this title may be more detailed than is currently provided on the target page or in a section of that page |info= ** When the target page becomes too large, or for any reason a new page would be an improvement, this redirect may be replaced with an article, template or other project page that is carved out of the target page. See also {{tl|R to section}} and use together with this rcat when appropriate. ** If the topic of the redirect is not susceptible to expansion, then use other rcats such as {{tl|R to section}} or {{tl|R to list entry}} ''when appropriate''. ** Since a new page may be created, links to this redirect ''should '''not''''' be replaced with a direct link to the target page. To make ''redirects'' to this page, use {{tl|R avoided double redirect}}. ** {{tl|R printworthy}} should be used together with this template when applied to a redirect in [[WP:mainspace|mainspace]]. ** When used on a template redirect, it will automatically populate {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|'''{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}'''|{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}}}. |printworthy=yes |all category=<!--for automatic namespace detection--> }}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|R with possibilities||{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|[[Category:Template redirects with possibilities]]|[[Category:Redirects with possibilities]]}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R with possibilities |name={{C|Redirects with possibilities|With possibilities}} |from=a title that {{#ifexist: {{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}|is in [[WP:DRAFTSPACE|draft namespace]] at [[{{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}]], so {{red|'''''please do not create an article from this redirect'''''}} (unless moving a ready draft here). You are welcome to improve the draft article while it is being considered for inclusion in [[WP:mainspace|article namespace]]. If the draft link is a redirect, then you may boldly turn that redirect into a draft article[[Category:Redirects with draftspace articles]]|potentially could be expanded into a new article or other type of associated page such as a new template}}. The topic described by this title may be more detailed than is currently provided on the target page or in a section of that page |info= ** When the target page becomes too large, or for any reason a new page would be an improvement, this redirect may be replaced with an article, template or other project page that is carved out of the target page. See also {{tl|R to section}} and use together with this rcat when appropriate. ** If the topic of the redirect is not susceptible to expansion, then use other rcats such as {{tl|R to section}} or {{tl|R to list entry}} ''when appropriate''. ** Since a new page may be created, links to this redirect ''should '''not''''' be replaced with a direct link to the target page. To make ''redirects'' to this page, use {{tl|R avoided double redirect}}. ** {{tl|R printworthy}} should be used together with this template when applied to a redirect in [[WP:mainspace|mainspace]]. ** When used on a template redirect, it will automatically populate {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|'''{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}'''|{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}}}. |printworthy=yes |all category=<!--for automatic namespace detection--> }}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|R with possibilities||{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|[[Category: redirects with possibilities]]|[[Category:Redirects with possibilities]]}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Redirects with draftspace articles]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R with possibilities |name={{C|Redirects with possibilities|With possibilities}} |from=a title that {{#ifexist: {{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}|is in [[WP:DRAFTSPACE|draft namespace]] at [[{{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}]], so {{red|'''''please do not create an article from this redirect'''''}} (unless moving a ready draft here). You are welcome to improve the draft article while it is being considered for inclusion in [[WP:mainspace|article namespace]]. If the draft link is a redirect, then you may boldly turn that redirect into a draft article|potentially could be expanded into a new article or other type of associated page such as a new template}}. The topic described by this title may be more detailed than is currently provided on the target page or in a section of that page |info= ** When the target page becomes too large, or for any reason a new page would be an improvement, this redirect may be replaced with an article, template or other project page that is carved out of the target page. See also {{tl|R to section}} and use together with this rcat when appropriate. ** If the topic of the redirect is not susceptible to expansion, then use other rcats such as {{tl|R to section}} or {{tl|R to list entry}} ''when appropriate''. ** Since a new page may be created, links to this redirect ''should '''not''''' be replaced with a direct link to the target page. To make ''redirects'' to this page, use {{tl|R avoided double redirect}}. ** {{tl|R printworthy}} should be used together with this template when applied to a redirect in [[WP:mainspace|mainspace]]. ** When used on a template redirect, it will automatically populate {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|'''{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}'''|{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}}}. |printworthy=yes |all category=<!--for automatic namespace detection--> }}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|R with possibilities||{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|[[Category: redirects with possibilities]]|[[Category:Redirects with possibilities]]}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R with possibilities |name={{C|Redirects with possibilities|With possibilities}} |from=a title that {{#ifexist: {{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}|is in [[WP:DRAFTSPACE|draft namespace]] at [[{{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}]], so {{red|'''''please do not create an article from this redirect'''''}} (unless moving a ready draft here). You are welcome to improve the draft article while it is being considered for inclusion in [[WP:mainspace|article namespace]]. If the draft link is a redirect, then you may boldly turn that redirect into a draft article|potentially could be expanded into a new article or other type of associated page such as a new template}}. The topic described by this title may be more detailed than is currently provided on the target page or in a section of that page |info= ** When the target page becomes too large, or for any reason a new page would be an improvement, this redirect may be replaced with an article, template or other project page that is carved out of the target page. See also {{tl|R to section}} and use together with this rcat when appropriate. ** If the topic of the redirect is not susceptible to expansion, then use other rcats such as {{tl|R to section}} or {{tl|R to list entry}} ''when appropriate''. ** Since a new page may be created, links to this redirect ''should '''not''''' be replaced with a direct link to the target page. To make ''redirects'' to this page, use {{tl|R avoided double redirect}}. ** {{tl|R printworthy}} should be used together with this template when applied to a redirect in [[WP:mainspace|mainspace]]. ** When used on a template redirect, it will automatically populate {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|'''{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}'''|{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}}}. |printworthy=yes |all category=<!--for automatic namespace detection--> }}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|R with possibilities||{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|[[Category: redirects with possibilities]]|[[Category:Redirects with possibilities]]}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R with possibilities |name={{C|Redirects with possibilities|With possibilities}} |from=a title that {{#ifexist: {{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}|is in [[WP:DRAFTSPACE|draft namespace]] at [[{{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}]], so {{red|'''''please do not create an article from this redirect'''''}} (unless moving a ready draft here). You are welcome to improve the draft article while it is being considered for inclusion in [[WP:mainspace|article namespace]]. If the draft link is a redirect, then you may boldly turn that redirect into a draft article|potentially could be expanded into a new article or other type of associated page such as a new template}}. The topic described by this title may be more detailed than is currently provided on the target page or in a section of that page |info= ** When the target page becomes too large, or for any reason a new page would be an improvement, this redirect may be replaced with an article, template or other project page that is carved out of the target page. See also {{tl|R to section}} and use together with this rcat when appropriate. ** If the topic of the redirect is not susceptible to expansion, then use other rcats such as {{tl|R to section}} or {{tl|R to list entry}} ''when appropriate''. ** Since a new page may be created, links to this redirect ''should '''not''''' be replaced with a direct link to the target page. To make ''redirects'' to this page, use {{tl|R avoided double redirect}}. ** {{tl|R printworthy}} should be used together with this template when applied to a redirect in [[WP:mainspace|mainspace]]. ** When used on a template redirect, it will automatically populate {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|'''{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}'''|{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}}}. |printworthy=yes |all category=<!--for automatic namespace detection--> }}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|R with possibilities||{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|[[Category: redirects with possibilities]]|[[Category:Redirects with possibilities]]}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R with possibilities |name={{C|Redirects with possibilities|With possibilities}} |from=a title that {{#ifexist: {{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}|is in [[WP:DRAFTSPACE|draft namespace]] at [[{{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}]], so {{red|'''''please do not create an article from this redirect'''''}} (unless moving a ready draft here). You are welcome to improve the draft article while it is being considered for inclusion in [[WP:mainspace|article namespace]]. If the draft link is a redirect, then you may boldly turn that redirect into a draft article|potentially could be expanded into a new article or other type of associated page such as a new template}}. The topic described by this title may be more detailed than is currently provided on the target page or in a section of that page |info= ** When the target page becomes too large, or for any reason a new page would be an improvement, this redirect may be replaced with an article, template or other project page that is carved out of the target page. See also {{tl|R to section}} and use together with this rcat when appropriate. ** If the topic of the redirect is not susceptible to expansion, then use other rcats such as {{tl|R to section}} or {{tl|R to list entry}} ''when appropriate''. ** Since a new page may be created, links to this redirect ''should '''not''''' be replaced with a direct link to the target page. To make ''redirects'' to this page, use {{tl|R avoided double redirect}}. ** {{tl|R printworthy}} should be used together with this template when applied to a redirect in [[WP:mainspace|mainspace]]. ** When used on a template redirect, it will automatically populate {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|'''{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}'''|{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}}}. |printworthy=yes |all category=<!--for automatic namespace detection--> }}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|R with possibilities||{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|[[Category: redirects with possibilities]]|[[Category:Redirects with possibilities]]}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R with possibilities |name={{C|Redirects with possibilities|With possibilities}} |from=a title that {{#ifexist: {{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}|is in [[WP:DRAFTSPACE|draft namespace]] at [[{{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}]], so {{red|'''''please do not create an article from this redirect'''''}} (unless moving a ready draft here). You are welcome to improve the draft article while it is being considered for inclusion in [[WP:mainspace|article namespace]]. If the draft link is a redirect, then you may boldly turn that redirect into a draft article|potentially could be expanded into a new article or other type of associated page such as a new template}}. The topic described by this title may be more detailed than is currently provided on the target page or in a section of that page |info= ** When the target page becomes too large, or for any reason a new page would be an improvement, this redirect may be replaced with an article, template or other project page that is carved out of the target page. See also {{tl|R to section}} and use together with this rcat when appropriate. ** If the topic of the redirect is not susceptible to expansion, then use other rcats such as {{tl|R to section}} or {{tl|R to list entry}} ''when appropriate''. ** Since a new page may be created, links to this redirect ''should '''not''''' be replaced with a direct link to the target page. To make ''redirects'' to this page, use {{tl|R avoided double redirect}}. ** {{tl|R printworthy}} should be used together with this template when applied to a redirect in [[WP:mainspace|mainspace]]. ** When used on a template redirect, it will automatically populate {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|'''{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}'''|{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}}}. |printworthy=yes |all category=<!--for automatic namespace detection--> }}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|R with possibilities||{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|[[Category: redirects with possibilities]]|[[Category:Redirects with possibilities]]}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23573030467|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R with possibilities |name={{C|Redirects with possibilities|With possibilities}} |from=a title that {{#ifexist: {{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}|is in [[WP:DRAFTSPACE|draft namespace]] at [[{{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}]], so {{red|'''''please do not create an article from this redirect'''''}} (unless moving a ready draft here). You are welcome to improve the draft article while it is being considered for inclusion in [[WP:mainspace|article namespace]]. If the draft link is a redirect, then you may boldly turn that redirect into a draft article|potentially could be expanded into a new article or other type of associated page such as a new template}}. The topic described by this title may be more detailed than is currently provided on the target page or in a section of that page |info= ** When the target page becomes too large, or for any reason a new page would be an improvement, this redirect may be replaced with an article, template or other project page that is carved out of the target page. See also {{tl|R to section}} and use together with this rcat when appropriate. ** If the topic of the redirect is not susceptible to expansion, then use other rcats such as {{tl|R to section}} or {{tl|R to list entry}} ''when appropriate''. ** Since a new page may be created, links to this redirect ''should '''not''''' be replaced with a direct link to the target page. To make ''redirects'' to this page, use {{tl|R avoided double redirect}}. ** {{tl|R printworthy}} should be used together with this template when applied to a redirect in [[WP:mainspace|mainspace]]. ** When used on a template redirect, it will automatically populate {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|'''{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}'''|{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}}}. |printworthy=yes |all category=<!--for automatic namespace detection--> }}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|R with possibilities||{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template||}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category: redirects with possibilities]] [[Category:Redirects with possibilities]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R with possibilities |name={{C|Redirects with possibilities|With possibilities}} |from=a title that {{#ifexist: {{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}|is in [[WP:DRAFTSPACE|draft namespace]] at [[{{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}]], so {{red|'''''please do not create an article from this redirect'''''}} (unless moving a ready draft here). You are welcome to improve the draft article while it is being considered for inclusion in [[WP:mainspace|article namespace]]. If the draft link is a redirect, then you may boldly turn that redirect into a draft article|potentially could be expanded into a new article or other type of associated page such as a new template}}. The topic described by this title may be more detailed than is currently provided on the target page or in a section of that page |info= ** When the target page becomes too large, or for any reason a new page would be an improvement, this redirect may be replaced with an article, template or other project page that is carved out of the target page. See also {{tl|R to section}} and use together with this rcat when appropriate. ** If the topic of the redirect is not susceptible to expansion, then use other rcats such as {{tl|R to section}} or {{tl|R to list entry}} ''when appropriate''. ** Since a new page may be created, links to this redirect ''should '''not''''' be replaced with a direct link to the target page. To make ''redirects'' to this page, use {{tl|R avoided double redirect}}. ** {{tl|R printworthy}} should be used together with this template when applied to a redirect in [[WP:mainspace|mainspace]]. ** When used on a template redirect, it will automatically populate {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|'''{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}'''|{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}}}. |printworthy=yes |all category=<!--for automatic namespace detection--> }}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|R with possibilities||{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template||}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category: redirects with possibilities]] [[Category:Redirects with possibilities]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R with possibilities |name={{C|Redirects with possibilities|With possibilities}} |from=a title that {{#ifexist: {{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}|is in [[WP:DRAFTSPACE|draft namespace]] at [[{{{draft|Draft:{{PAGENAME}}}}}]], so {{red|'''''please do not create an article from this redirect'''''}} (unless moving a ready draft here). You are welcome to improve the draft article while it is being considered for inclusion in [[WP:mainspace|article namespace]]. If the draft link is a redirect, then you may boldly turn that redirect into a draft article|potentially could be expanded into a new article or other type of associated page such as a new template}}. The topic described by this title may be more detailed than is currently provided on the target page or in a section of that page |info= ** When the target page becomes too large, or for any reason a new page would be an improvement, this redirect may be replaced with an article, template or other project page that is carved out of the target page. See also {{tl|R to section}} and use together with this rcat when appropriate. ** If the topic of the redirect is not susceptible to expansion, then use other rcats such as {{tl|R to section}} or {{tl|R to list entry}} ''when appropriate''. ** Since a new page may be created, links to this redirect ''should '''not''''' be replaced with a direct link to the target page. To make ''redirects'' to this page, use {{tl|R avoided double redirect}}. ** {{tl|R printworthy}} should be used together with this template when applied to a redirect in [[WP:mainspace|mainspace]]. ** When used on a template redirect, it will automatically populate {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|'''{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}'''|{{Cat|Template redirects with possibilities}}}}. |printworthy=yes |all category= }}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|R with possibilities||{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template||}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category: redirects with possibilities]] [[Category:Redirects with possibilities]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
